title: lasianthus rhinocerotis
intro: Lasianthus rhinocerotis, also known as the rhinoceros lasiandra, is a plant species within the family Theaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lasianthus rhinocerotis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
